metaTitle: Rodent Proofing NYC | Rat & Mouse Exclusion | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Comprehensive rodent proofing and exclusion services in NYC. Seal every entry point permanently. Licensed exterminators. One-year structural guarantee. Call now.
h1: Rodent Proofing in NYC — Sealed Out Permanently
heroParagraph: Killing the rodents you have is temporary. Sealing every way they get in is permanent. Our rodent proofing service is a comprehensive structural exclusion program that identifies and seals every gap, crack, hole, and opening that rats or mice use to enter your property — using steel mesh, copper wool, concrete patching, door sweep replacement, and expanding foam reinforced with hardware cloth. We back every rodent-proofing job with a one-year structural guarantee.

faqs.q: What's the difference between rodent proofing and regular pest control?
faqs.a: Standard rodent control eliminates the current infestation through trapping and baiting. Rodent proofing focuses on exclusion — physically preventing any rodents from entering. The most effective programs combine both: eliminate the current population, then seal every entry point so no new population can establish.
Rodent proofing ranges from $500–$3,000 depending on property size and the number of entry points requiring sealing. A full-inspection quote is provided before any work begins.
